Uses of Class
heif.boxes.Box

  • Packages that use Box 
    Package Description
    heif
    Provides high-level classes for parsing and manipulating HEIF-based files.
    heif.boxes
    Classes for parsing and representing individual HEIF-structured boxes.

    • Uses of Box in heif

      Fields in heif with type parameters of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private java.util.Map<HeifBoxType,java.util.List<Box>> BoxHandler.heifBoxMap 
      private java.util.List<Box> BoxHandler.rootBoxes 
      Methods in heif with type parameters of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private <T extends Box>
      T      		 BoxHandler.getBox(HeifBoxType type, java.lang.Class<T> clazz)
      Retrieves the first matching box of a specific type and class.
      Methods in heif that return Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static Box BoxFactory.createBox(ByteStreamReader reader) 
      Methods in heif that return types with arguments of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.Iterator<Box> BoxHandler.iterator()
      Returns a depth-first iterator over all parsed boxes, starting from root boxes.
      Methods in heif with parameters of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private void BoxHandler.walkBoxes(Box box, int depth)
      Recursively traverses the HEIF box tree to build the internal map and establish parent-child relationships.

    • Uses of Box in heif.boxes

      Subclasses of Box in heif.boxes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  AuxiliaryTypePropertyBox
      Represents the auxc (Auxiliary Type Property Box), providing auxiliary image type information.
      class  CleanApertureBox
      Represents the clap (Clean Aperture Box).
      class  ColourInformationBox
      This derived class handles the Box identified as colr - Colour information Box.
      class  DataInformationBox
      This derived Box class handles the Box identified as dinf - Data Information Box.
      static class  DataInformationBox.DataEntryBox
      An inner class used to store a DataEntryBox object, containing information such as URL/URN location and name.
      static class  DataInformationBox.DataReferenceBox
      An inner class designed to fill up the dref box type.
      class  FileTypeBox
      The FileTypeBox must be the first box in every HEIF-based file, including HEIC still image files.
      class  FullBox
      This code creates a complete class that stores ubiquitous high-level data applicable for the majority of the derived Box objects, serving as the complete primary header box.
      class  HandlerBox
      This derived box, namely the hdlr type, declares media type of the track, and the process by which the media-data in the track is presented.
      class  ImageMirrorBox
      This derived Box class handles the Box identified as imir - Image Mirroring Box.
      class  ImageRotationBox
      This derived Box class handles the Box identified as irot - Image rotation Box.
      class  ImageSpatialExtentsProperty
      This derived Box class handles the Box identified as ispe - Image spatial extents Box.
      class  ItemDataBox
      This derived Box class handles the Box identified as idat - Item Data Box.
      class  ItemInfoEntry
      Represents an infe (Item Info Entry) box inside an iinf box.
      class  ItemInformationBox
      Represents the iinf (Item Information Box), which describes items within the HEIF file.
      class  ItemLocationBox
      The ItemLocationBox class handles the HEIF Box identified as iloc (Item Location Box).
      class  ItemPropertiesBox
      Represents the iprp (Item Properties Box) in a HEIF/HEIC file structure.
      static class  ItemPropertiesBox.ItemPropertyContainerBox
      Represents the ipco (ItemPropertyContainerBox), a nested container holding an implicitly indexed list of item property boxes.
      class  ItemPropertyAssociationBox
      Represents the ipma (Item Property Association Box) in HEIF/ISOBMFF files.
      class  ItemReferenceBox
      Represents the iref (Item Reference Box) in HEIF/ISOBMFF files.
      static class  ItemReferenceBox.SingleItemTypeReferenceBox
      Represents a SingleItemTypeReferenceBox box, which stores a group of item references of a specific type.
      class  MetaBox
      Represents a MetaBox meta structure in HEIF/ISOBMFF files.
      class  PixelAspectRatioBox
      Represents the pasp (Pixel Aspect Ratio Box), defining the relative width and height of a pixel (square vs non-square pixels).
      class  PixelInformationBox
      Represents the pixi (Pixel Information Box), which provides bit depth and number of channels for a reconstructed image.
      class  PrimaryItemBox
      Represents the pitm (Primary Item Box) in HEIF/ISOBMFF files.
      Fields in heif.boxes declared as Box 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private Box Box.parent 
      Fields in heif.boxes with type parameters of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private java.util.List<Box> MetaBox.containedBoxList 
      private java.util.List<Box> ItemPropertiesBox.ItemPropertyContainerBox.properties 
      private java.util.List<Box> ItemReferenceBox.references 
      Methods in heif.boxes that return Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Box Box.getParent()
      Returns the parent box of this child box for referencing purposes
      private Box ItemPropertiesBox.ItemPropertyContainerBox.getProperty(int propertyIndex)
      Retrieves the property box based on the specified index.
      Box ItemPropertiesBox.getPropertyByIndex(int index)
      Retrieves a property by its 1-based index from the container.
      Methods in heif.boxes that return types with arguments of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.util.List<Box> MetaBox.getBoxList()
      Returns a combined list of all boxes contained in this MetaBox.
      java.util.List<Box> ItemReferenceBox.getBoxList()
      Returns the list of child boxes.
      java.util.List<Box> ItemPropertiesBox.getBoxList()
      Returns a combined list of all boxes contained in this ItemPropertiesBox, including both property container and associations.
      java.util.List<Box> ItemPropertiesBox.ItemPropertyContainerBox.getBoxList()
      Returns a list of all boxes contained in this ItemPropertyContainerBox, specifically all properties.
      java.util.List<Box> ItemInformationBox.getBoxList()
      Returns the list of ItemInfoEntry entries defined as (infe) contained in this box.
      java.util.List<Box> DataInformationBox.getBoxList()
      Returns a copy of DataReferenceBox object (dref) as a list.
      java.util.List<Box> DataInformationBox.DataReferenceBox.getBoxList()
      Returns a copy of contained boxes defined as DataEntryBox entries.
      java.util.List<Box> Box.getBoxList()
      Returns a list of child boxes, if applicable.
      java.util.List<Box> ItemPropertiesBox.getPropertyListByItem(int itemID)
      Resolves all property boxes associated with a specific item ID.
      Methods in heif.boxes with parameters of type Box 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Box.setParent(Box outerbox)
      Sets the parent of this child box.
      protected void Box.validateBounds(Box child)
      Ensures the child box resides within the parent's byte boundaries.
      Constructors in heif.boxes with parameters of type Box 
      Constructor Description
      AuxiliaryTypePropertyBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs an AuxiliaryTypePropertyBox from the box header and content.
      Box(Box box)
      A copy constructor to replicate field values one by one, useful for sub-classing, retaining the original field values.
      CleanApertureBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader) 
      ColourInformationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a ColourInformationBox from a parent Box and a byte reader.
      DataEntryBox(Box header, ByteStreamReader reader) 
      DataInformationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object, providing additional information from other contained boxes, specifically dref - Data Reference Box and its nested contained boxes, where further additional information on URL location and name is provided.
      DataReferenceBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader) 
      FileTypeBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a FileTypeBox, parsing its fields from the specified ByteStreamReader.
      FullBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a FullBox by extending a standard Box header with version and flags data.
      HandlerBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object, extending the super class FullBox to provide more specific information about this box.
      ImageMirrorBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object whose aim is to mirror the image either vertically or horizontally about its axis.
      ImageRotationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object whose aim is to retrieve the angle (in anti-clockwise direction) in units of degrees.
      ImageSpatialExtentsProperty(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object whose aim is to gather information both on width and height of the associated image item.
      ItemDataBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      This constructor creates a derived Box object, providing additional data of metadata items.
      ItemInfoEntry(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Parses an ItemInfoEntry from the specified reader.
      ItemInformationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Parses the ItemInformationBox from the specified reader.
      ItemLocationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs an ItemLocationBox by parsing the provided iloc box data.
      ItemPropertiesBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs an ItemPropertiesBox by reading the ipco (property container) and one or more ipma (item-property association) boxes.
      ItemPropertyAssociationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs an ItemPropertyAssociationBox object, parsing its structure from the specified ByteStreamReader.
      ItemPropertyContainerBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs an ItemPropertyContainerBox resource by reading sequential boxes.
      ItemReferenceBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs an ItemReferenceBox, reading its references from the specified ByteStreamReader stream.
      MetaBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a MetaBox, parsing its fields from the specified ByteStreamReader.
      PixelAspectRatioBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader) 
      PixelInformationBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a PixelInformationBox by parsing the specified box header and its content.
      PrimaryItemBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader)
      Constructs a PrimaryItemBox, reading its fields from the specified ByteStreamReader parameter.
      SingleItemTypeReferenceBox(Box box, ByteStreamReader reader, int version)
      Constructs a SingleItemTypeReferenceBox by reading its fields from the specified stream.
